Our Mission

Sport as a Force for Change

HERoics exists to uplift and empower girls and young women through sports-based programs that foster leadership, confidence, and lifelong skills.

By creating safe, inclusive, and opportunity-rich environments, HERoics strives to challenge gender inequality and inspire the next generation of female leaders.

Registered NPO · Cape Town, South Africa · Est. 2026

What We Do

7 Pillars of
Impact

Every programme we run is built on these core objectives — designed to create lasting, meaningful change in the lives of girls and young women across South Africa.

01
⚽
Sports Development
Structured football, netball and touch rugby training and life-skills programs for girls and young women of all backgrounds.
02
⭐
Talent Pathways
Identify, support, and showcase emerging female talent — giving every girl a chance to shine.
03
📚
Education & Leadership
Leadership coaching, communication skills, and career-readiness support beyond the pitch.
04
🌍
Access & Inclusion
Reducing barriers to participation so no girl is left behind regardless of background or circumstance.
05
🤝
Community Engagement
Collaborating with schools, clubs, and local leaders to build a stronger support network.
06
📣
Advocacy & Representation
Promoting female leadership and representation in sport at every level of the game.
07
💚
Health & Wellbeing
Fostering emotional, physical, and social wellness as foundations for a thriving life.
Our Vision
"A future where every girl has equal access to sport, leadership and development."

Regardless of background, every girl deserves the opportunity to unlock her full potential — using sport as the platform that opens doors.

Our Values

Built on Solid Foundations

Inclusivity

Every girl deserves a seat at the table — and a place on the pitch — regardless of background.

Empowerment

We build confidence from the inside out — through sport, mentorship, and lived experience.

Integrity

All resources go directly to our mission. Transparent governance, zero private gain.

Community

We don't work in communities — we work with them. Collaboration is at our core.

Transparency

How We're Run

HERoics is a registered non-profit association governed by a board of office bearers. No private profit. Every rand goes to the mission.

Board Structure

Governed by a minimum of three unrelated individuals — Chairperson/Director, Secretary, and Treasurer — serving one-year renewable terms.

Meetings & Accountability

Board meets at least quarterly. Quorum requires two-thirds of board members. Annual General Meetings include financial reporting and board elections.

Financial Controls

All withdrawals require authorisation from at least two office bearers. Detailed financial records maintained and reviewed annually.

Constitutional Integrity

Constitution adopted 2026. Any amendments require two-thirds board approval with 14 days written notice.

Our Community

Our Partners

HERoics is built on collaboration. Together with schools, football clubs, and generous funders, we're changing the game for girls across South Africa.

Education Partners

Schools

We work hand-in-hand with schools to bring structured sports programs and life-skills programmes directly into communities, reaching girls where they learn every day.

Support Tiers

Choose Your Impact Level

Whether you're an individual supporter or a corporate sponsor, there's a place for you in the HERoics family.

Supporter

Individual · Any Amount
  • Fund training sessions
  • Support kit & equipment
  • Receive impact updates
  • Be part of the journey

Champion

Organisation · Monthly
  • Named programme sponsor
  • Logo on HERoics materials
  • Invited to events & showcases
  • Quarterly impact reports
  • B-BBEE partnership value

Founding Partner

Corporate · Yearly
  • Everything in Champion
  • Co-branded programme naming
  • Annual partnership review
  • Staff volunteer opportunities
  • Media & PR co-visibility
